model-chip: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: 6px;
msg-user: align-self: flex-end; max-width: 78%; background: var(--user-bubble); color: var(--text); padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.45;
msg-asst: align-self: flex-start; max-width: 96%; color: var(--text); font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.55;
asst-tools: margin-top: 12px; display: flex; gap: 10px; color: var(--text-tertiary);
compose-pill: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--divider); border-radius: 24px; padding: 6px 6px 6px 10px;
send-btn: width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--send); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
compose-hint: margin-top: 8px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-tertiary); text-align: center;
